det_check_template:
proof fn det_remove_l3_entry(pre_self_: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3i: L3Index, target_l3_p: PageMapPtr, target_l2_p: PageMapPtr, post1_self_: PageTable, r1: (PageMapPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<PageMap>>), post2_self_: PageTable, r2: (PageMapPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<PageMap>>))
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512), (0 <= target_l3i < 512), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).is_Some()), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l4(target_l4i).get_Some_0().addr
                == target_l3_p), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
            ).is_Some()), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_1g_l3(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
            ).is_None()), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
            ).unwrap().addr == target_l2_p), (forall|i: L2Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l2(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
                i
            ).is_None()), (forall|i: L2Index| #![auto] 0 <= i < 512 ==> pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_2m_l2(
                target_l4i,
                target_l3i,
                i
            ).is_None()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_l4_end == pre_self_.kernel_l4_end)
            &&& (post1_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().remove(target_l2_p))
            &&& (post1_self_.mapping_2m() == pre_self_.mapping_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapping_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapping_4k())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapping_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapping_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_entries =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries)
            &&& (r1.0 == target_l2_p)
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == target_l2_p)
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.kernel_l4_end == pre_self_.kernel_l4_end)
            &&& (post2_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().remove(target_l2_p))
            &&& (post2_self_.mapping_2m() == pre_self_.mapping_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapping_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapping_4k())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapping_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapping_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.kernel_entries =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries)
            &&& (r2.0 == target_l2_p)
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == target_l2_p)
        }) ==> det_remove_l3_entry_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
